candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not current assets; clearly the wrong asset class.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported balance-sheet total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Operating cash metric, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement balance, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance, but balance-sheet line is the direct match.

candidates.row_label: Value adjustment of cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Reconciliation item, not the cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the exact balance-sheet cash line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Cash flow movement, not period-end liabilities balance.
Wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the exact current liabilities total.

candidates.row_label: Current portion of debt to credit institutions
candidates.why: Clean current debt / current maturities borrowing line; fits short-term debt and excludes leases.
May represent short-term bank financing/overdrafts and can be part of financing-related current debt when separately reported.

final_choice.row_label: Current portion of debt to credit institutions

variables.notes: R:nc. Included current portion of bank debt plus operating credits as the minimal set of non-lease short-term financing liabilities. Excluded 'Current portion of lease liabilities' per rule and avoided non-debt payables.

candidates.why: Likely current income tax liability/payable on the balance sheet; best available taxes-payable style line.
Could denote tax-related line, but values are blank in preview and wording is less standard than the populated 'Income tax' liability line.

variables.notes: No explicit 'taxes payable/current tax liabilities' label appears. Chose 'Income tax' as the most plausible current tax payable balance-sheet line; excluded 'Prepaid income tax' because it is an asset.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet total corresponding to property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment in progress
candidates.why: Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.
Construction-in-progress component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Loss from sale of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow/income adjustment item, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of property plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capex flow, not PPE balance.

candidates.row_label: Profit/loss from sale of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Disposition gain/loss, not PPE balance.

candidates.row_label: Sale of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash inflow from sale, not PPE balance.

variables.notes: Under IFRS/Nordic reporting, 'Tangible assets' is the standard equivalent of total PPE.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line.
Often a pre-tax/pre-interest subtotal rather than final operating cash flow; less preferred when the exact operating cash flow total exists.

variables.notes: Used the exact cash-flow statement line for net cash from operating activities.
